name: New BITS Job Created Via PowerShell
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: frack113
SIGMA Title: New BITS Job Created Via PowerShell
SIGMA Description: Detects the creation of a new bits job by PowerShell

False positives:
- Administrator PowerShell scripts

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=3 AND (LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%\powershell.exe%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%\pwsh.exe%') AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY New BITS Job Created Via PowerShell on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=3 AND (LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%\powershell.exe%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%\pwsh.exe%') AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: New BITS Job Created Via PowerShell

Event description: Converted from SIGMA Rule. Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Event Name
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
